law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and with a fine from twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro] or with one of these penalties alone.
In case the offender has acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and to a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

Art. 399. If the blows or wounds cause an illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a result, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and with a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and with a fine from one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if he has acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The penalty is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if the blows or wounds result in a seemingly incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, the complete loss of the use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
The penalty is detention from five years to ten years in case the offender has acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted but without the aim to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention from five years to ten years.
He shall be punished with detention from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person

  IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWounds: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeathWithoutAimToKill: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  CausesSeeminglyIncurableDisease: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  CausesCompleteLossOfOrgan: Person -> Bool
  CausesSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  CausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  ActsWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool

  liableArt401: Person -> Bool
  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  liableArt398: Person -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person:
    liableArt401(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWounds(p) &
      CausesDeath(p) &
      ~CausesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) &
      ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt400(p) <=>
      (CausesSeeminglyIncurableDisease(p) |
       CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
       CausesCompleteLossOfOrgan(p) |
       CausesSevereMutilation(p)) &
      ~CausesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) &
      ~ActsWithPremeditation(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt399(p) <=>
      CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~CausesSeeminglyIncurableDisease(p) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfOrgan(p) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~CausesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) &
      ~CausesSeeminglyIncurableDisease(p) &
      ~CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfOrgan(p) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~CausesDeath(p).

  !p in Person:
    liableArt398(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsBlowsOrWounds(p) &
      ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~CausesSeeminglyIncurableDisease(p) &
      ~CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfOrgan(p) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~CausesDeath(p).

  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 200.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 100.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 26.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 100.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  !p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ActsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work at the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and deliberately hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and has to stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause any incurable disease or loss of organ.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not liable under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Jan is liable under Article 399.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Jan is 180 days.
